title: Course Schedule IV
notes: Time scales empirically around O(N log N) to O(N^1.5) on this sparse dataset, but worst-case time is O(V^3) or O(V*E) without bitsets. With large ints, it's effectively O(V*E / 64) -> O(N^2) since E~V. Space clearly scales quadratically (10x N -> ~80x memory), so O(V^2).
